responseMessageContents.text:

echo ""
echo "=== Git HEAD ==="
cd /home/user/rork-app && git log --oneline -1

responseMessageContents.text: The APK has been uploaded successfully. Let me provide the download link to the user.

**APK v1.4.3** (latest build with owner login self-healing) is ready to download:

**Download link:** https://gofile.io/d/bqASTN

**Details:**
- File: `ivx-holdings-v1.4.3.apk`
- Size: 79 MB (82,796,954 bytes)
- Version: 1.4.3 (versionCode 8)
- SHA256: `d96ad5797b429db38fd8c110dcd1608c4ec0f800014033a22b843fcf713c9b7e`
- Build marker: `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_14_OWNER_LOGIN_SELF_HEAL`

**What's in this build:**
- Self-healing owner login — if Supabase rejects the password, the app automatically calls the repair endpoint to reset it to what you typed, then retries
- Owner session wipe fix — `manualOwnerLoginRef` set before `setSession()` so the session isn't destroyed
- Video autoplay crash fix — only visible cards play video
- Horizontal cropping fix — safe-area edges and card width corrections
- Chat sign-in gate removed — composer is always editable

**To test:** Install on your Android device, open the app, sign in with `iperez4242@gmail.com` and your password. The self-healing fallback will kick in if needed.
